strengths: 20 years of engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and infrastructure—exceeds 15-year minimum and demonstrates sustained technical depth
Current Staff Engineer role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, showing active engagement with modern AI tooling
Proven full-stack builder with shipped products (GISCollective, WatchUp top-10 Apple TV app) and open-source libraries
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms built—resume shows infrastructure tooling but not recognized AI expertise or models shipped to customers
Lacks strategic leadership experience; background is hands-on implementation and technical craftsmanship, not director-level strategic advisory or customer-facing innovation partnerships
Resume has major credibility red flag: name listed as 'Aisha Okonkwo' but all contact info, GitHub, website, and work history reference 'Szabo Bogdan'—appears to be falsified or copied

key_factors.factor: Strategic leadership gap vs. director-level role requirements
Years of experience meets minimum requirement

response.justification: Candidate has strong foundational credentials—20 years of engineering experience exceeding the 15-year minimum, BS in Computer Science, and proven ability to ship products across diverse technical domains. Current role touching AI infrastructure (MCP, agents) shows relevant interest. However, the role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI'—this résumé shows infrastructure tooling, not AI-powered products or customer-facing innovation. More critically, the role is director-level seeking a strategic partner to advise customers and shape cloud/AI futures; this background emphasizes hands-on implementation over strategic leadership. The name/contact mismatch raises serious authenticity concerns.
